clusters.label: Builder Source of Truth
clusters.notes: Canonical planning and visualization layer. Owns roadmap accuracy, recursive priorities, and live substantiation of what the product plan actually is.

clusters.label: Governed Automation Foundation
clusters.notes: Heartbeat, execute mode, bounded pilot, governance bridge, audit logging, and other core action-control primitives.

clusters.label: Unified Ingress Packaging
clusters.notes: Channels, webhooks, cron, Gmail Pub/Sub, and the governed event envelope that makes them feel productized instead of bespoke.

clusters.label: Execution Gateway and Adapters
clusters.notes: One bounded execution plane for browser, exec, web, providers, services, plugins, and future tools.

clusters.label: Memory Governance Core
clusters.notes: Epistemic typing, promotion policy, deterministic lifecycle interceptors, governance ledger events, and retrieval legibility.

clusters.label: Temporal and Reliability Memory Stack
clusters.notes: UOR identity, decay, pinning, crystallization, temporal memory, reliability, and operator-facing memory APIs.

clusters.label: EvolveAI Recursive Learning
clusters.notes: Governed learning packets, experiment proposals, self-modification review, and recursive improvement loops.

clusters.label: Quarantine and External Discourse
clusters.notes: Moltbook intake, quarantine visibility, adversarial content handling, and safe external exploration boundaries.
